visual_findings: The native SigLIP encoder LoRA path works and generates nonblank C096 images.
Frog, chibi, mascot, and yokai references still collapse toward a green adult humanoid face or bust.
Heldout07 remains a failure: non-human side-profile and jaw silhouette are not preserved.
C096 w1.4 is visually close to C094/C095 and does not add a decisive new reference-control signal.
next_decision: Use larger reviewed hard-shape pairs or deeper encoder adaptation instead of repeating shallow encoder LoRA at this data scale.
